# Voss

> Voss is a local control plane for coding agents: scoped tools, live workspace supervision, approvals, independent review, and replayable audits.

## Primary Pages

- [Home](https://voss.dev/): Product overview for Voss, installation paths, and the terminal-native workflow.
- [Harness](https://voss.dev/harness): Details on the coding harness, modes, tools, sessions, and bounded repository work.
- [Agentic Development Environment](https://voss.dev/ade): Overview of the local ADE surface for live runs, approvals, sessions, replay, and inspection.
- [Language](https://voss.dev/language): Introduction to the .voss control language for confidence, context budgets, semantic routing, and agent composition.
- [Security](https://voss.dev/security): Security model for harness permissions, local credentials, project boundaries, and execution safety.
- [Roadmap](https://voss.dev/roadmap): Current product direction across live local supervision, managed project instructions, external-agent handoffs, and budget-aware context.

## Documentation

- [Documentation Home](https://docs.tryvoss.dev): Technical documentation for installing, configuring, and using Voss.
- [Quickstart](https://docs.tryvoss.dev/get-started/quickstart): Fast path for installing Voss and running the first bounded repo task.
- [Harness Overview](https://docs.tryvoss.dev/harness/overview): How the Voss harness runs model sessions inside explicit project and permission boundaries.
- [Harness Commands](https://docs.tryvoss.dev/harness/commands): CLI command reference for common Voss harness workflows.
- [Harness Modes](https://docs.tryvoss.dev/harness/modes): Explanation of plan, edit, and auto permission modes.
- [Harness Tools](https://docs.tryvoss.dev/harness/tools): Read/write/shell/git tool surface exposed to Voss sessions.
- [Language Overview](https://docs.tryvoss.dev/language/overview): Overview of the .voss language and compiler/runtime direction.
- [Security Overview](https://docs.tryvoss.dev/security/overview): Security posture and operational boundaries for using Voss.
- [Latest Changelog](https://docs.tryvoss.dev/changelog/2026-06-10): Live workspace preview and next roadmap update.

## Developer Resources

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/bm9797/Voss): Source repository, issue history, and implementation details for Voss.
- [Product Requirements Document](https://github.com/bm9797/Voss/blob/main/PRD.md): Product requirements and background context for Voss.

## Optional

- [Roadmap Documentation](https://docs.tryvoss.dev/roadmap/v0-1): Detailed v0.1 roadmap documentation.
- [Troubleshooting Reference](https://docs.tryvoss.dev/reference/troubleshooting): Diagnostic guidance for common install, auth, and runtime issues.
